description: Append-only daily snapshot of KOSPI / Big Tech / HBM signals. Never modify or delete past entries.

snapshots.note: First snapshot. Run delayed past 08:00 KST pre-market; uses 2026-05-07 close data.

hbm_signals.samsung_hbm4_nvidia_qual: passed (late 2025); paid samples; Q1 2026 contract; Q2 2026 deliveries expected
hbm_signals.cxmt_hbm_mass_production: delayed; 2026 mass production now considered unlikely (Digitimes 2026-04-21)

macro.iran_us_status: MOU via Pakistan; Hormuz reopening proposed; senior Iranian rebuffed

snapshots.note: Intraday morning update (~20 min after first snapshot). Reflects 2026-05-08 KOSPI open (09:02 KST quote) and 2026-05-07 US close. New macro shock: US-Iran Strait of Hormuz strikes overnight 5/7-5/8.

bigtech_financial_health.delta_vs_prev_snapshot: no new data in 24h; next trigger Q2'26 earnings (2026-07)

hbm_signals.samsung_hbm4_status: passed NVIDIA qual (2025-12); mass production began 2026-02; shipping to NVIDIA
hbm_signals.skhynix_hbm4_status: still optimizing for 11Gb/s test (per 2026-03 reports); mass-production line in place since Sept 2025
hbm_signals.rdimm_vs_hbm_pricing: RDIMM contract prices have overtaken HBM (atypical) — TrendForce Apr.2026

macro.iran_us_status: Hormuz ceasefire under severe strain; US strikes Qeshm Island & Bandar Abbas overnight 5/7-5/8; Iran claims missile strike on US destroyers; Trump paused 'Operation Freedom' but considering resumption; Korean cargo ship Namu-ho towed to Dubai after explosion
macro.trump_xi_summit: Beijing 2026-05-14 / 2026-05-15; CNBC 5/8: Iran focus may delay tariff/rare-earth progress

red_flags_triggered_24h.description: US-Iran ceasefire collapse risk; US strikes Bandar Abbas; oil +2.26%; KOSPI -1.95%; foreigners selling 1.75T KRW
red_flags_triggered_24h.note: Not in the 6 hardcoded HBM/capex triggers, but logged as macro risk for continuity

snapshots.note: 3rd morning intraday update (~11 min after second snapshot). Added explainer panels for all sections (A through F) per spec. KOSPI ticked further down at 09:16 KST but Samsung/SK hynix V-recovered to +2~3% from -3% open.

bigtech_capex_2026_guidance_usd_bn.delta_vs_prev_snapshot: no change; next trigger Q2'26 earnings (2026-07)

bigtech_financial_health.delta_vs_prev_snapshot: no new data in 24h; next trigger Q2'26 earnings (2026-07)

hbm_signals.samsung_hbm4_status: passed NVIDIA qual (2025-12); mass production began 2026-02; 30%+ NVIDIA HBM4 supply contract finalization stage
hbm_signals.skhynix_hbm4_status: M15X fab first cleanroom completion in May 2026 with pilot operations (HBM3E + HBM4 production)
hbm_signals.cxmt_hbm_mass_production: delayed per Digitimes 2026-04-21 (primary source); secondary reports (Technetbook April) claim 12-layer HBM first mass production — conflicting
hbm_signals.rdimm_vs_hbm_pricing: RDIMM contract prices have overtaken HBM (atypical) — TrendForce Apr.2026

macro.iran_us_status: Hormuz ceasefire violations claimed by both sides 5/7-5/8; CENTCOM says US Navy passing through Hormuz repelled Iranian attack with self-defense response; Iran IRGC claims US attacked Hormuz vessels and civilian areas; 14-point one-page MOU under negotiation (30-day Hormuz truce + 20-year uranium enrichment halt + HEU transfer + US sanctions relief)
macro.trump_xi_summit: Beijing 2026-05-14 / 2026-05-15 confirmed; agenda: Iran oil, Taiwan, tariffs, rare earths, AI (H200, AI safety dialogue forum, Jimmy Lai release possibility); CNBC 5/8: Iran focus may delay tariff/rare-earth progress; Trump first US presidential visit to China in ~10 years

red_flags_triggered_24h.description: US-Iran ceasefire violations both sides; KOSPI -2.13% at 09:16 KST; foreigners -1.75T / institutions -0.12T / individuals +1.85T KRW; USD/KRW overnight 1456.00 (+0.90); Samsung/SK hynix V-recovery from -3% to +2~3%
red_flags_triggered_24h.note: Continuation of 5/8 macro shock from previous snapshot; no NEW hardcoded HBM/capex triggers in 24h

snapshots.note: 4th morning intraday update (~2h after 3rd snapshot). KOSPI lunch-session window. New file structure adopted: snapshots/ archive + index.html as session list. Full dashboard moved to snapshots/2026-05-08-0425UTC.html.

bigtech_capex_2026_guidance_usd_bn.delta_vs_prev_snapshot: no change in 24h; next trigger Q2'26 earnings (2026-07)

bigtech_financial_health.delta_vs_prev_snapshot: no new data in 24h; next trigger Q2'26 earnings (2026-07)

hbm_signals.samsung_hbm4_status: passed NVIDIA qual (2025-12); mass production began 2026-02; 30%+ NVIDIA HBM4 supply contract finalization stage; yield ~50% (need 70% for full mass production)
hbm_signals.skhynix_hbm4_status: M15X fab first cleanroom completion in May 2026 with pilot operations (HBM3E + HBM4 production); 11Gb/s test optimization ongoing
hbm_signals.cxmt_hbm_mass_production: delayed per Digitimes 2026-04-21 (primary source); secondary reports (Technetbook April) claim 12-layer HBM first mass production — conflicting
hbm_signals.trendforce_dram_bulletin_2026_05_06: supplier inventories bottomed out; AI/server demand driving Q2 contract price hikes
hbm_signals.rdimm_vs_hbm_pricing: RDIMM contract prices have overtaken HBM (atypical) — TrendForce Apr.2026

macro.iran_us_status: Overnight 5/7-5/8 US strikes on Bandar Abbas and Qeshm Island (retaliation for Iranian missile/drone/small-boat attacks on USS Truxton, USS Mason, USS Rafael Peralta); Trump: no destroyer damage. 14-point MOU under negotiation (end war, 30-day window, 12-yr enrichment moratorium, HEU transfer, US sanctions relief, Hormuz transit unrestricted). Iran publicly more pessimistic than US officials.
macro.trump_xi_summit: Beijing 2026-05-14 / 2026-05-15 confirmed; agenda: Iran oil, Taiwan, tariffs, rare earths, semis (H200, AI safety dialogue), Jimmy Lai release possibility; Trump first US presidential visit to China in ~10 years

snapshots.summary: 5/8 장중 점심 시간대 갱신: KOSPI 약 -1.2%(7,399.31, 10:36 KST 기준)로 오전 저점 -2.13%에서 회복; 삼성·SK하이닉스 -3% 개장 후 V자 +2~3%; 외국인 매도 지속(-1.75조원); 24h 신규 RED FLAG 트리거 0건; 호르무즈는 진행 중·신규 격화 없음.
snapshots.file_structure_change: Migrated to per-session snapshots: full dashboard now lives at snapshots/2026-05-08-0425UTC.html; index.html regenerated as session list.
